friendly: Ribbit! Morning boost is live — early tasks, bonus XP. Let's get it. 🐸
The early window is open. Your morning tasks earn more. Go.
Up early? The pond rewards it. Morning boost is on. 🐸
militant: 0600. Move. Morning boost is live.
Early window open. Don't waste it.
Morning boost active. Capitalize. Now.

friendly: Night owl bonus is live. Still time to get those tasks in. 🐸
Late session open — the pond doesn't sleep. Bonus XP for evening tasks.
Evening mode. The boost window is yours. Ribbit! 🐸
militant: Night owl window open. No wasted time.
Late session boost active. Push through.
2100. Boost window live. Work.

muted: Quest underway. Tasks contribute to goal.
friendly: Your quest is calling. Every task you finish moves that bar closer to 100. 🐸
Quest mode active — the frog is watching your progress. Keep stacking tasks.
Ribbit! Live quest. Cross those tasks off and watch the needle move. 🐸
militant: Quest is live. Every completed task counts. Don't let it stall.
Active quest. Close tasks. Move the needle.
Quest in flight. No idle time. Execute.

friendly: You've been putting in the work — it shows. Keep it up. 🐸
Active session. The pond is taking notes. Don't slow down now.
Tasks done, stats rising. This is how it's done. 🐸
militant: Good output this session. Don't stop here.
Work logged. Maintain the pace.
Recent tasks recorded. Keep going.

friendly: Streak active — every day you show up matters. Protect it. 🐸
Consistent. That's the word. Your streak is proof. Keep going.
Day after day, the frog notices. Your streak is still going. 🐸
militant: Streak is live. Protect it. Today counts.
You've built something here. Don't break it.
Streak active. Show up. Do the work.

friendly: Every day is a fresh start! What are you working on?
Here when you need me — let's check in and get moving!
Another chance to make progress. Ribbet!
militant: Session open. What are you waiting for?
Get to work.
New day. Same mission. Move.

friendly: Quest {{questPercent}}% done! +{{xpGained}} XP! You're getting there!
Progress! Quest at {{questPercent}}% — keep stacking those completions!
+{{xpGained}} XP and a step closer! Quest locked in at {{questPercent}}%!
militant: {{questPercent}}% done. +{{xpGained}} XP. Continue.
Quest: {{questPercent}}%. +{{xpGained}} XP. Don't stop.
Progress logged: {{questPercent}}%. No room for complacency.

friendly: QUEST COMPLETE! You crushed it! Check-in task is ready for you!
100%! The quest is done! Head to QuickActions for your check-in!
MISSION ACCOMPLISHED! Quest complete — check-in task is waiting!
militant: Quest complete. Close it out. Check-in task: do it now.
COMPLETE. Quest done. Check-in task live — finish the cycle.
Quest closed. Check-in task up. No delays.

muted: Quest deadline passed. Exigency options available.
Finish line missed. Select an option to continue.
friendly: Hey, the deadline passed — but that's okay! You can extend or adjust the timeline.
Missed the finish line, but quests don't die easy! Let's pick up and keep going.
The finish date came and went — use the exigency options to get back on track!
militant: Deadline passed. Pick an option and keep the quest alive.
Finish line slipped. Reassess and relaunch — quitting isn't on the menu.
Missed the date. Not the end. Select an exigency and move forward.

friendly: Got it! Quest state updated.
Changes noted — your quest is updated!
Understood! Toggled and saved.
militant: Toggled. State recorded. Move on.
Adjustment made. Continue.
State change logged.

friendly: Level {{level}}! Ribbit — you leveled up! The pond is cheering. 🐸
LEVEL {{level}} unlocked. Every task, every day. This one is earned.
Level {{level}}. Look how far you've come. Keep going. 🐸
militant: Level {{level}}. You earned it. Maintain the standard.
LEVEL {{level}}. Threshold crossed. Set your next target.
New level: {{level}}. Baseline raised. Move on.

friendly: Your streak starts NOW! Day one of something great!
Streak is alive! Let's see how far we can take this!
Day one! Streaks are built one day at a time — starting today!
militant: Streak: day one. Start strong.
Streak launched. Show up tomorrow.
Day one. No excuses from here.

friendly: {{streakCount}} days! Your streak is legendary!
{{streakCount}}-day streak! You're consistent — that's rarer than you think!
{{streakCount}} days straight! That's serious dedication!
militant: {{streakCount}} days. Milestone logged. Don't break now.
{{streakCount}}-day streak. Good. Continue.
{{streakCount}} days. You built this. Protect it.

muted: Streak ended. Today is day one.
Streak count cleared. New run begins.
friendly: The streak broke — that's okay. The frog has seen it before. Today is day one again. 🐸
Streaks bend before they break — and then they restart. You've done it before. Do it again.
Yesterday's streak is done. Today's is just getting started. Ribbit. 🐸
militant: Streak lost. Acknowledge it. Start the new one today.
Reset. The new streak begins now.
Missed. Noted. Move on. Day one starts here.

friendly: BADGE EARNED: {{itemName}}! Check your BadgeBoard — it's waiting for you!
Achievement unlocked — {{itemName}} badge is yours! Time to place it on your board!
{{itemName}} badge awarded! Head to BadgeBoard and show it off!
militant: Badge: {{itemName}}. You earned it. Claim it.
Achievement logged: {{itemName}} badge. Check your board.
{{itemName}} — acquired. BadgeBoard updated.

friendly: NEW GEAR DROPPED: {{itemName}}! Check your Equipment and equip it!
Gear reward! {{itemName}} has been added to your inventory!
{{itemName}} is yours! Head to Equipment and suit up!
militant: Gear acquired: {{itemName}}. Equip it. Use it.
New gear: {{itemName}}. Inventory updated. Equip and move on.
{{itemName}} — earned. Gear it up.

friendly: Talent tier unlocked! You've grown into something new. Check your abilities. 🐸
New tier, new tools. The frog is impressed — go see what you've unlocked. 🐸
Ability unlocked! This is what leveling up looks like. Put it to use.
militant: Talent tier unlocked. New capability active. Deploy it.
Enhancement acquired. You're stronger now. Act like it.
Tier advanced. New tools in hand. Use them.

muted: Welcome Event is active. Complete the task inside.
friendly: Ribbit! Tap the Welcome Event — your first quest awaits! 🐸
militant: Open the Welcome Event. Complete the task. Move.

muted: Add a routine and explore the time views.
friendly: Time to splash around! Add a routine and check out Week and Month views 🐸
militant: Add a routine. Switch to Week view. Switch to Month view. Go.

muted: Explore the app rooms and complete the GTD task.
friendly: The pond is big — explore it! Check your tasks, schedule, and resources 🐸
militant: Open Tasks. Open Schedule. Open Resources. Complete the GTD item.

muted: Set your display name and claim your identity.
friendly: Who are you, adventurer? Set your name and claim your first badge! 🐸
militant: Set your name. Place your badge. Equip your gear. Open Adventures.

friendly: Welcome back! Let's catch up on what you've been up to!
Good to see you again! Checking in on your recent activity...
You're back! Let's see what happened while you were away!
militant: Back. Check your activity log. Move.
Session open. Review missed activity. Get moving.
You're here. Good. Catch up. Move forward.
